integration_validation_v2.gap: EditableSurface providers have NO production wiring; ModelManualSurface/RetrievalPolicySurface are constructed only with in-memory test closures and the integration test asserts hardcoded action_id/write_box_schema_id constants it supplies itself, never touching the real ModelManual surface or PG policy table.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/self_improve/editable_surface.rs:183-296 (closure-injected read/write); grep shows ModelManualSurface::new/RetrievalPolicySurface::new only at editable_surface.rs:560-639 (tests); tests/editable_surface_tests.rs:53-57 + 192-245 record test-authored MODEL_MANUAL_ACTION_ID/WRITE_BOX constants, comment lines 18-22 say it does not 'drag the entire catalog dispatcher in'.

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-149 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Flight Recorder Session And Command Events -- Define Flight Recorder event families for session lifecycle and command lifecycle only.
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Flight Recorder Session And Command Events
scope.summary: MT-149 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Flight Recorder Session And Command Events -- Define Flight Recorder event families for session lifecycle and command lifecycle only.
scope.v3_correction: v3 correction: the original scope.summary/acceptance text ("Flight Recorder Session And Command Events") is mis-labelled; the validated deliverable per integration_validation_v2 and the v3 remediation playbook is the EditableSurface providers production wiring (src/atelier/editable_surface_authority.rs, pg_model_manual_surface / pg_retrieval_policy_surface, proven by atelier_editable_surface_authority_tests).
